title: schlechterella bicornaria
intro: Schlechterella bicornaria, also known as the 'two-horned' or 'bicornaria' plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to be effective in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating infections, and it is often used to make herbal preparations such as infusions and tinctures. However, further research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of Schlechterella bicornaria for medicinal use.
